have h₂ := h_env 0 0
    have h₃ := h_env 1 0
    have h₄ := h_env 0 1
    have h₅ := h_env 1 1
    simp_all [Fin.ext_iff, Function.funext_iff, Fin.val_zero, Fin.val_one]
    <;>
    (try decide) <;>
    (try simp_all) <;>
    (try aesop)
  exact h₁

<;>
  (try cases input_var <;> try simp_all [ElaboratedCircuit]) <;>
  (try contradiction) <;>
  (try tauto) <;>
  (try simp_all [ConstraintsHold.Completeness]) <;>
  (try aesop) <;>
  (try norm_num) <;>
  (try ring_nf) <;>
  (try linarith) <;>
  (try nlinarith)
  <;>
  (try
    {
      simp_all [ElaboratedCircuit, ConstraintsHold.Completeness]
      <;>
      (try contradiction) <;>
      (try tauto) <;>
      (try aesop) <;>
      (try norm_num) <;>
      (try ring_nf) <;>
      (try linarith) <;>
      (try nlinarith)
    })

have h : ConstraintsHold.Completeness env
    (match circuit offset with
      | ⟨_, _, _, _, i⟩ => i) := by
    exact h_env
  exact h
